ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the role belongs to */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of the role (e.g., HDFS, YARN, Hive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  "last_heartbeat" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last heartbeat from the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the role (e.g., running, stopped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the cluster was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the cluster was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the cluster */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the cluster (e.g., CDH, CDP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the health metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "threshold_warning" TEXT /* Warning threshold for the metric */,
  "threshold_critical" TEXT /* Critical threshold for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "alert_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert type (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert configuration */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the configuration belongs to */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert type */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is enabled */,
  "threshold_warning" TEXT /* Warning threshold for the alert */,
  "threshold_critical" TEXT /* Critical threshold for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last updated */,
  "recipients" TEXT /* List of email addresses to send alerts to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_configurations_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_configurations_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert configuration that triggered the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, resolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES alert_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Current value of the setting */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the setting was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., security, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filesystems" (
  "fs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filesystem */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the filesystem belongs to */,
  "fs_name" TEXT /* Name of the filesystem */,
  "fs_path" TEXT /* Path of the filesystem */,
  "fs_capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the filesystem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the filesystem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the filesystem was last updated */,
  "mount_point" TEXT /* Mount point of the filesystem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filesystems_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filesystem_metrics" (
  "fs_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filesystem metric */,
  "fs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filesystem the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "threshold_warning" TEXT /* Warning threshold for the metric */,
  "threshold_critical" TEXT /* Critical threshold for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fs_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filesystem_metrics_fs_id FOREIGN KEY ("fs_id") REFERENCES filesystems ("fs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., role, cluster) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., role, cluster) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backup_jobs" (
  "backup_job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup job */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster being backed up */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the backup job */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the backup job (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_run" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last run */,
  "next_run" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the backup job (e.g., running, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backup_jobs_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backup_history" (
  "backup_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup history entry */,
  "backup_job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backup job */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the backup */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the backup (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the backup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backup_history_backup_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("backup_job_id") REFERENCES backup_jobs ("backup_job_id")
)
